settings.text: Every member receives a digital badge in Apple & Google Wallet, member pricing, and priority bay access.

settings.name: Anytime
settings.access: Full access, any time we're open

settings.name: Founding Member
settings.access: Anytime access, rate locked for life

settings.heading: Find Your Plan
settings.subheading: Every member receives a digital badge in Apple & Google Wallet, member pricing, and priority access.

settings.title: Digital Wallet Badge
settings.text: Every member receives a digital membership badge for Apple Wallet and Google Wallet. Show it at the counter — no card needed.

settings.title: Member Pricing
settings.text: Members save on bucket rates, simulator bookings, pro shop purchases, and lesson fees. Your membership pays for itself.

settings.title: Priority Bay Access
settings.text: During peak hours, members get priority access to the best bays on the range. No waiting, more hitting.

settings.title: Member-Only Events
settings.text: Exclusive events, clinics, and competitions throughout the year. First access to the Long Drive Classic and seasonal programs.
